author: xauravww
description: AES-encrypt markdown notes with lock/unlock vault, auto-lock timer, right-click encrypt/decrypt, corruption recovery, search decrypt, status bar indicator, file explorer decorations, and password change. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: xauravww
releases.description: Full feature release: lock/unlock vault, auto-lock timer (seconds), right-click encrypt/decrypt on any .md file, corruption recovery, search decrypt, status bar indicator, file explorer decorations, password change, lock on blur, and hotkey info in settings.
releases.name: v2.1.0
